5:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Long-Running Tasks"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Maintain context across sessions for projects that span hours, days, or weeks."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Challenge"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Agent sessions restart on:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Deployment updates"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Infrastructure failures"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Scheduled maintenance"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Scale-down events"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Without persistent memory, context is lost."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Solution"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Missing diagram content"}]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Session Management"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\nmem = Memory()\n\n# Start a task\nsession_id = mem.start_session(\n  name=\"website-redesign\",\n  description=\"Redesign company website\",\n)\n\n# Store progress\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"Completed hero section design. User approved color palette.\",\n  session_id=session_id,\n  tags=[\"website-redesign\", \"design\"],\n)\n\n# Later session — resume context\nmem.resume_session(session_id)\ncontext = mem.recall_session(session_id)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Checkpointing"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Save intermediate states:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Create checkpoint\ncheckpoint = mem.checkpoint()\nmem.remember(\n  content=f\"Checkpoint: {checkpoint.id}\",\n  tags=[\"checkpoint\"],\n)\n\n# Restore if needed\nmem.restore_checkpoint(checkpoint.id)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Deployment Considerations"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Concern | Solution |\n|---------|----------|\n| Database persistence | Persistent volume |\n| Backup before deploy | Pre-deploy backup job |\n| Migration on upgrade | Automatic schema migration |\n| Monitoring | Alert if last session > 24h old |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Example: Weekly Report Agent"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Runs every Monday at 9 AM\ndef generate_weekly_report():\n  mem = Memory()\n  \n  # Recall last week's activities\n  last_week = mem.recall(\n      \"project updates decisions\",\n      since=(datetime.now() - timedelta(days=7)).isoformat(),\n  )\n  \n  # Generate report\n  report = compile_report(last_week)\n  \n  # Store report for future reference\n  mem.remember(\n      content=report.summary,\n      tags=[\"weekly-report\", f\"week-{get_week_number()}\"],\n      importance=0.7,\n  )\n  \n  return report\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Session IDs"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Use descriptive session IDs with timestamps: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"website-redesign-2026-04"}],". This makes manual inspection and debugging much easier."]}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/1324ugbfcq7x6.js","async":true}]],["$","$L4",null,{"children":["$","$5",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@6"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"hOmP2Cy-yrrgTKgwHamoc"}
